coveredRequirements: worktree-pr produces a PR description that references actual changed file paths from the diff
worktree-pr description is not a hardcoded or trivially short placeholder — body has meaningful diff-derived content
worktree-pr inspects all files in the diff — PR body references every changed file
worktree-pr handles empty diff gracefully without crashing
worktree-pr retrieves the git diff before building the PR description
Review and update extensions/worktree.ts — module is the updated target containing PR description logic
Unconfirmed product changes beyond the requested feature — no unrelated commands introduced
ambiguousRequirements: The feature behavior is documented in repo-grounded terms — this is a documentation/plan-quality criterion, not a testable runtime behavior; covered indirectly by verifying the feature works against the actual module
The plan cites affected modules or explicitly notes when no prior module exists — this is a plan-quality meta-requirement, not runtime behavior

Review and update __tests__/extensions/currently-it-is-not-possible-for-me-to-work-easily-on-the-sa.plan.test.ts — this file is the existing test suite; the plan scope item means ensuring tests are updated alongside the feature, which is what THIS test file accomplishes
(none) for Clarified decisions — there are no clarified decisions to test; the absence is noted
Critical behavior remains ambiguous and needs clarification before implementation — this edge case is a process concern, not a testable runtime behavior
notes: Fix 1 (insufficient-behavioral-assertions): Rewrote the 'references changed files' test to assert specific file paths (worktree.ts, utils.ts) appear in the PR body, not generic English words.

Fix 2 (placeholder check): Rewrote to extract the --body content via extractPrBody helper, assert body length >= 50, assert it contains diff-derived file names, and assert it does not match known trivial placeholder strings.
Fix 3 (all files inspected): Rewrote to assert that the PR body/command references all three specific file paths (auth.ts, api.ts, README.md) rather than just checking that a diff call was made.
Fix 4 (empty diff): Simplified the try/catch to only mark as unexpected if no graceful notice was emitted. Added post-completion assertion that either a PR was created or a notice was emitted.
Fix 5 (scope: test file): The __tests__ scope item means this test file itself IS the updated test artifact. Noted in ambiguousRequirements.
Fix 6 (out of scope): Added test verifying no unrelated commands are introduced beyond worktree-related ones.
Fix 7 (clarified decisions): No clarified decisions exist — noted in ambiguousRequirements as untestable.

Fix 8 (feature documented in repo-grounded terms): This is a plan-quality meta-requirement, covered indirectly by testing against the actual extensions/worktree.ts module. Noted in ambiguousRequirements.
Uses node:test runner to match local test conventions observed in all example files.
Added extractPrBody helper to robustly extract the --body flag content from gh pr create commands.
